introSection: Keffeekannen-Express (English: Coffee Pots Express) is steel indoor roller coaster located at Karls Erlebnis-Dorf Rövershagen in Rövershagen, Mecklenburg-Western Pomerania, Germany.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has two tyre propelled lifts.

fullText:
Keffeekannen-Express (English: Coffee Pots Express) is steel indoor roller coaster located at Karls Erlebnis-Dorf Rövershagen in Rövershagen, Mecklenburg-Western Pomerania, Germany.

The ride has two tyre propelled lifts.

Red track and green supports.


 * Kaffeekannen-Express on the park's website (In German)
